---
title: "Artigos para o seminário"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
---

---- 

### Artigos etras para o seminário

[1-Andrew 1993.pdf](Artigos Univarida/1-Andrew 1993.pdf)  
[2-Archambault 1996.pdf](Artigos Univarida/2-Archambault 1996.pdf)  
[3-Barros 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/3-Barros 2001.pdf)  
[4-Boaventura 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/4-Boaventura 2002.pdf)  
[5-Chapman 1994.pdf](Artigos Univarida/5-Chapman 1994.pdf)  
[6-Chapman 2010.pdf](Artigos Univarida/6-Chapman 2010.pdf)  
[7-Charton 2004.pdf](Artigos Univarida/7-Charton 2004.pdf)  
[8-Clarke & Ward 1994.pdf](Artigos Univarida/8-Clarke & Ward 1994.pdf)  
[9-Clemente 2007.pdf](Artigos Univarida/9-Clemente 2007.pdf)  
[10-Commito 2006.pdf](Artigos Univarida/10-Commito 2006.pdf)  
[11-Crowe 1999.pdf](Artigos Univarida/11-Crowe 1999.pdf)  
[12-Dempster 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/12-Dempster 2002.pdf)  
[13-Dempster 2005.pdf](Artigos Univarida/13-Dempster 2005.pdf)  
[14-Di Domenico 2009.pdf](Artigos Univarida/14-Di Domenico 2009.pdf)  
[15-Eggleston 1998.pdf](Artigos Univarida/15-Eggleston 1998.pdf)  
[16-Fraschetti 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/16-Fraschetti 2001.pdf)  
[17-Gray 1996.pdf](Artigos Univarida/17-Gray 1996.pdf)  
[18-Gray 2009.pdf](Artigos Univarida/18-Gray 2009.pdf)  
[19-Hernandez 2006.pdf](Artigos Univarida/19-Hernandez 2006.pdf)  
[20-Lindegarth 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/20-Lindegarth 2001.pdf)  
[21-Morais 2003.pdf](Artigos Univarida/21-Morais 2003.pdf)  
[22-Morrisey 2003.pdf](Artigos Univarida/22-Morrisey 2003.pdf)  
[23-Morrisey Espacial 1992.pdf](Artigos Univarida/23-Morrisey Espacial 1992.pdf)  
[24-Morrisey Temporal 1992.pdf](Artigos Univarida/24-Morrisey Temporal 1992.pdf)  
[25-Murphy 2009.pdf](Artigos Univarida/25-Murphy 2009.pdf)  
[26-Negrello-Filho 2006.pdf](Artigos Univarida/26-Negrello-Filho 2006.pdf)  
[27-Noren 2005__.pdf](Artigos Univarida/27-Noren 2005__.pdf)  
[28-Olabarria 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/28-Olabarria 2001.pdf)  
[29-Olabarria 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/29-Olabarria 2002.pdf)  
[30-Olabarria 2009.pdf](Artigos Univarida/30-Olabarria 2009.pdf)  
[31-Paiva 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/31-Paiva 2001.pdf)  
[32-Perez-ruzafa 2007.pdf](Artigos Univarida/32-Perez-ruzafa 2007.pdf)  
[33-Rajasekharan 2007.pdf](Artigos Univarida/33-Rajasekharan 2007.pdf)  
[34-Rindi 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/34-Rindi 2002.pdf)  
[35-Ruiz & Romero 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/35-Ruiz & Romero 2001.pdf)  
[36-Salovius .pdf](Artigos Univarida/36-Salovius .pdf)  
[37-Boaventura 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/37-Boaventura 2002.pdf)  
[38-Vannini 2008.pdf](Artigos Univarida/38-Vannini 2008.pdf)  
[39-Ysebaert 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/39-Ysebaert 2002.pdf)  
[40-Chapman 1994.pdf](Artigos Univarida/40-Chapman 1994.pdf)  
[40a-Hughes 1999.pdf](Artigos Univarida/40a-Hughes 1999.pdf)  
[41-Chapman 2010.pdf](Artigos Univarida/41-Chapman 2010.pdf)  
[42-Charton 2004.pdf](Artigos Univarida/42-Charton 2004.pdf)  
[43-Clarke & Ward 1994.pdf](Artigos Univarida/43-Clarke & Ward 1994.pdf)  
[44-Clemente 2007.pdf](Artigos Univarida/44-Clemente 2007.pdf)  
[45-Boaventura 2002.pdf](Artigos Univarida/45-Boaventura 2002.pdf)  
[46-Cannicci etal 2009.pdf](Artigos Univarida/46-Cannicci etal 2009.pdf)  
[47-Guichard 2001.pdf](Artigos Univarida/47-Guichard 2001.pdf)  
[48-Henry Jenkins 1995.pdf](Artigos Univarida/48-Henry Jenkins 1995.pdf)  
[49-Lourenço-McKinley 2011.pdf](Artigos Univarida/49-Lourenço-McKinley 2011.pdf)  
[50-Underwood 1999__.pdf](Artigos Univarida/50-Underwood 1999__.pdf)  
[51-Winberg 2007.pdf](Artigos Univarida/51-Winberg 2007.pdf)  
[52-James e Fairweather 1996.pdf](Artigos Univarida/52-James e Fairweather 1996.pdf)  
[53-Neves2012.pdf](Artigos Univarida/53-Neves2012.pdf)  
[54-Camargo 2017.pdf](Artigos Univarida/54-Camargo 2017.pdf)
